summary: Marketing Studio (Phase A) — full backend + frontend testing. 12/12 pytest cases pass (1 real Nano Banana 512x512 generation + soft-delete + reuse of existing asset). Storefront PromoBanner renders when enabled, disappears when toggled off. Admin /admin/marketing-studio renders with generator, gallery, stats, all data-testids present. Existing asset 63e17e3a... intact. Banner toggled OFF at end of run so storefront is not in test state.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: /api/admin/marketing-studio/generate uses req.dict() (deprecated in Pydantic v2). services/marketing_studio.py:126 and routes use .dict()/model_dump inconsistently — consider standardising on model_dump. Non-blocking.

Minor: serve_marketing_media accepts {path:path} which allows subpaths but then force-prefixes 'tile-station/marketing/' so only filename segment is effective — works but the route signature is misleading; could be tightened to {filename}.
Minor: publish endpoint does not validate link_url / cta_text format. Not a blocker for admin-only usage.
Positive: Pydantic Field constraints (ge=256, le=4096, regex patterns) are correctly enforced and yield 422 as expected. Admin guard via _require_admin works (403 on no token).
Positive: Soft-delete filter {deleted: {$ne: True}} is correct and tested. MongoDB _id excluded cleanly.
seed_data_creation: Created 1 nano-banana 512x512 asset for testing, then soft-deleted it. Existing asset 63e17e3a615347f1b2d78ef0129ab278 preserved and currently set to promo_banner=OFF (image_url retained, enabled=false).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Marketing Studio is fully functional. Promo banner is currently disabled but image_url is still set to the bank-holiday asset — main agent can flip enabled=true via PUT /api/admin/marketing-studio/promo-banner if needed for demo. Nano Banana generation costs ~$0.04 per call; gpt-image-1 NOT tested (cost conservative).
tests_executed: POST /api/admin/marketing-studio/assets/<id>/publish placement=promo_banner → public GET /api/website/promo-banner returns enabled:true with image_url
DELETE /api/admin/marketing-studio/assets/<id> → soft-delete, no longer in list

FRONTEND: /admin/marketing-studio renders marketing-studio-page, marketing-studio-generator, marketing-gallery, marketing-generate-btn, marketing-studio-refresh-btn, marketing-model-select, marketing-preset-select — all present
FRONTEND: Storefront / shows promo-banner + promo-banner-image when enabled (naturalWidth=1200, correct bank holiday image)
FRONTEND: Storefront promo-banner element removed from DOM after admin toggles enabled=false
